figures.caption: Figure 1: Concept of state-dependent gating compared with static spectral kernel in standard neural operators.
Figure 2: Architecture of the TF-SNO. TF-SNO introduces time-frequency gating in the Adaptive Spectral Operator Block (ASOB) and embeds ASOBs into a multiscale U-shaped backbone.
Table 1: Rollout results of all comparison methods at prediction step of {1,10,25,50} for six benchmarks.
Table 2: Overall rollout results of all models on six nonstationary PDE benchmarks, in terms of MSE, H1, and L2.
Table 3: Ablation results on E1 and E4 removing different components of TF-SNO.

Figure 3: Calibration of frequency-band energy in TF-SNO model. Blue lines with left axis represent spectrum energy, red lines with right axis represent learned band routing weights, and green regions show the effective bandwidths.
